title: collomia mazama
intro: Collomia mazama, also known as Mazama's Collomia, is a perennial flowering plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Collomia mazama can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal infusions, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
